description: Example API response format that SHEET_API_URL should return
format: Must be a JSON array of objects

example_response.content: Hello world! This is my first scheduled tweet via automation. 🚀
Testing tweet #2 - scheduled for afternoon. Let's see how this works!
Third tweet with longer content to test multi-character typing speeds and pause timings across the automation. 🙌
Excited to announce that our new feature is live! Head over to x.com to check it out.

notes: content: Keep under 280 characters for X compatibility
date: Must be YYYY-MM-DD format (e.g., 2026-05-20 for May 20, 2026)
time: Must be HH:mm in 24-hour format (14:30 for 2:30 PM, 09:00 for 9 AM)
The scheduler will convert times to 12-hour AM/PM format for X's UI
